TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ageq, title = Ageq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ageq} }

S.FORM: alang Ageq ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 49 buwan, 151 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 140 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ageq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ageq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ageq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ageq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ageq hya' ga Cinbulan. tay mkyahu' na Ageq hya' ga Micista. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ageq ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 49 buwan, 151 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 140 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ageq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ageq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ageq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ageq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ageq hya' ga Cinbulan. tay mkyahu' na Ageq hya' ga Micista. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ aɣeq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na aɣeq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na aɣeq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na aɣeq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na aɣeq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na aɣeq ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨinβulan. taj mkjaħuʔ na aɣeq ħjaʔ ɣa miʦ~ʨis~ɕta. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
